title: After the Asahi Hai F.S.: With Eyes Wide Open

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Buzzing with excitement, Ines Fujin holds nothing
back during the Asahi Hai F.S. As a result,
however, she collapses shortly after crossing the
finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, it looks like her passionate performance has
lit up the hearts of countless rivals and
spectators.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For our next race, we choose the Satsuki Sho—the
first step of the Classic Triple Crown tour that
includes our main goal, the Japanese Derby. I'm
sure Ines Fujin's performance there will attract
plenty of attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The people close to Ines Fujin also see her in a
different light now. At work, her manager
suggests that she should quit for now to focus on
racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she does want to continue working to
support her sisters, Ines Fujin worries how I might
feel about the prospect.
